ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher, outfielder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's current team */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the player (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., BBWAA Manager of the year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League in which the award is given (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., player, manager, coach) */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the award (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player played for the team */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., captain, co-captain) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player with the team (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs (for batters) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average (for batters) */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average (for pitchers) */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts (for pitchers) */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for pitchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "voting_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "award_id" TEXT /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the voting result is for */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who received votes */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points received by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the player in the voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_votes" (
  "award_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award vote */,
  "voting_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting result the vote belongs to */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank given to the player by the voter */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of the vote (e.g., first place, second place) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_votes_voting_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_result_id") REFERENCES voting_results ("voting_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of the voter (e.g., journalist, coach) */,
  "voter_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, general manager) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "award_id" TEXT /* ID of the award the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., league-wide, team-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update award) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
